# Agentic Review Quality

Source pack: `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/`

## Load These Files

1. `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/README.md`
2. `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/planning.md`
3. `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/security.md`
4. `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/benchmark.md`
5. `.agent-context/skills/review-quality/release-decision.md`
6. `.agent-context/review-checklists/pr-checklist.md`

## Workflow

1. Identify blockers first by severity.
2. Tie findings to explicit rule and remediation.
3. Mark residual risks and test gaps clearly.
4. End with a pass or fail readiness verdict.
